rationale: CVA6 (OpenHW Group, Solderpad Hardware License 2.1) is a 6-stage in-order RV64GC+S-mode+Sv39 core with mature Linux boot, KVM/Hypervisor, and PMP support. Selected as little core (e1-pro) in the 1+3+4 target topology and as a Linux bring-up candidate via the Chipyard CVA6 wrapper.
phone_class_claim_blocked_reason: CVA6 is in-order single-issue and cannot match flagship big-core IPC alone. It is the little-core path in the 1+3+4 cluster; the flagship big core is the open XiangShan Kunminghu V3 8-wide scale-up (eliza-kunminghu-big-manifest.json).

wrapper_api_drift.summary: rtl/cpu/e1_cva6_wrapper.sv has been re-targeted to the OpenHW Group CVA6 v5.3.0 API. The wrapper instantiates `cva6 #(.CVA6Cfg(build_config_pkg::build_config(cva6_config_pkg::cva6_cfg)))` and bridges the noc_req_t / noc_resp_t structs to the flat AXI4 master signals via the new rtl/top/adapters/e1_cva6_to_e1axi4.sv adapter. Verilator --lint-only succeeds against the full v5.3.0 source list (185 modules, zero errors).
remaining_blockers: Verilator 5.049 V3Delayed internal error at external/cva6/cva6/core/frontend/btb.sv:188 (whole-array NBA of 2D unpacked struct array). Documented in external/cva6/pin-manifest.json::verilator_full_conversion_blocker.

SoC cluster slot 0 needs a 64<->128 AXI4 data-width converter before the wrapper drives real fabric traffic. Wrapper is currently instantiated under +define+E1_CLUSTER_SLOT0_CVA6 with its AXI master tied off as a placeholder.
wrapper_api_drift.enforced_by: scripts/check_cva6_pin.py (cross-references the standalone external/cva6/pin-manifest.json wrapper_api_drift block when the standalone checkout is present)
